name: Bank Statement Extraction Assistant
description: Extracts bank statement account metadata, balances, transaction rows, debits, credits, fees, and validation checks from local statement PDFs.

document_folder.description: Local folder containing Synthetic scanned bank statement PDFs with structured JSON metadata.

output_folder.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

field_profile.description: Field names or extraction profile for this workflow.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: AgamiAI Indian Bank Statement Synthetic Dataset
example.availability_note: Public synthetic bank statement dataset with scanned PDFs and structured JSON metadata.
example.download_hint: Use huggingface_hub or git-lfs to fetch a small sample before the full dataset.

contract.summary: Lenders, fintechs, SMB accounting tools, underwriting teams, and auditors need private extraction of account numbers, balances, merchant history, salaries, and cash-flow data.
users: Lenders, fintech teams, SMB accounting tools, underwriting teams, auditors, and financial operations groups.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before extracted values are released to downstream systems or used for consequential decisions.

dataset_input.name: AgamiAI Indian Bank Statement Synthetic Dataset
dataset_input.availability_note: Public synthetic bank statement dataset with scanned PDFs and structured JSON metadata.
dataset_input.download_hint: Use huggingface_hub or git-lfs to fetch a small sample before the full dataset.

steps.label: Stage Bank Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the bank-statement folder and AgamiAI sample input notes.

steps.label: Extract Bank Text
steps.goal: Read embedded text and call shared llm_ocr_skill only for scanned or low-text statement pages.

steps.label: Extract Transaction Ledger
steps.goal: Extract account metadata, balances, transaction rows, debits, credits, fees, and running balances.

steps.label: Validate Statement Consistency
steps.goal: Reconcile opening, closing, and running balances and compare to JSON labels when available.

steps.label: Write Bank Statement Packet
steps.goal: Write a review-only bank statement extraction packet with cash-flow and exception notes.

metadata.name: Bank Statement Extraction Assistant
metadata.description: Extracts bank statement account metadata, balances, transaction rows, debits, credits, fees, and validation checks from local statement PDFs.
metadata.agent_role: Local bank statement OCR and transaction extraction team that prepares source-grounded cash-flow review packets.
metadata.target_users: Lenders, fintech teams, SMB accounting tools, underwriting teams, auditors, and financial operations groups.
metadata.customizable_for: Underwriting intake, cash-flow analysis, audit workpapers, bank statement reconciliation, transaction normalization, and SMB bookkeeping.
metadata.problem: Lenders, fintechs, SMB accounting tools, underwriting teams, and auditors need private extraction of account numbers, balances, merchant history, salaries, and cash-flow data.

optional_inputs.name: review_policy
optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

mock.description: Uses the public dataset note and bundled text fixture when no local documents are selected.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

final_artifact.description: Review-only structured document automation packet with source evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with result, final_artifact, artifact paths, and run metadata when the runner is executed directly.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific document automation outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: Local filesystem intake plus shared llm_ocr_skill OCR through Docker Model Runner.

inputs.description: Resolved document folder, public dataset reference, and field extraction profile.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and redacted document automation logs.

outputs.description: Primary review packet and structured extraction results.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

web_ui.description: Optional review dashboard for artifact inspection.

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select a local folder containing Synthetic scanned bank statement PDFs with structured JSON metadata, confirm the output folder, and keep the public dataset terms visible before launch.
